age_range.evidence: Inclusion criteria were being ages 18 to 25

countries.evidence: Data was collected from a university located in the midwestern United States.

gender_split.evidence: The sample was mostly female (77.7%), followed by male (17.7%), non-binary (1.6%), and another unlisted gender (0.7%).

sample_size.evidence: resulting in a final sample of 575 participants.
